title: Fix parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter (#6983)

features.name: parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a class with parameter type and a typedef, used as a type parameter in an interface instantiation with scope resolution operator

features.name: interface type parameter pointing to parameterized class
features.description: Code should include an interface with a type parameter that defaults to a parameterized class
features.snippet:
interface outer #(parameter type X = C#(logic));
endinterface

features.name: class typedef passed as interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation passing a typedef from a class as a type parameter using scope resolution
